buggy.sumArray: off-by-one: i <= arr.length reads arr[arr.length] (undefined) -> NaN
buggy.isEven: wrong operator: n % 2 === 1 returns true for ODD numbers
buggy.getFirstId: unhandled empty: arr[0].id crashes on [] (cannot read id of undefined)
buggy.fetchUserName: missing await: returns Promise.name (undefined) instead of awaited value
buggy.parsePort: wrong default: parseInt returns NaN not null, ?? never fires -> NaN port
